name: Qualys
description: The Polarity Qualys Integration queries the Qualys Cloud Platform's Host Detection List and KnowledgeBase for IP Addresses, IPv6 Addresses, Domains, CVEs, and QIDs.

options.name: Qualys URL
options.description: The URL of the Qualys you would like to connect to (including http:// or https://)

options.name: Qualys Username
options.description: The Username for your Qualys Account

options.name: Qualys Password
options.description: The Password associated with the Qualys Account

options.name: Enable Scan Launch
options.description: When enabled, a 'Launch Scan' button appears in the Scans tab for IP address entities. Requires the Scan Option Profile to be configured.

options.name: Scan Option Profile
options.description: The Qualys option profile title or numeric ID to use when launching scans from Polarity (e.g., 'Initial Options' or '43165'). Required when Enable Scan Launch is enabled.

options.name: Scanner Appliance Name
options.description: The scanner appliance name to target when launching scans (e.g., 'scanner1'). Leave blank to use the default scanner for the target IP.
